title: Regrowing trees
description: This mod adds a passive world-regeneration mechanic by making trees slowly regrow over time.
body:
**Summary**

This mod adds a passive world-regeneration mechanic by making trees slowly regrow over time. It's a low-impact and subtle mod.

**Features**

-Passive Tree Growth: Approximately every 10 seconds, the mod will attempt to grow a new tree in a random location in the Overworld.

-Natural Spreading: Trees can grow on dirt and grass blocks, so they can naturally fill in empty spaces in forests or plains.

-Lightweight and Efficient: The mod is designed to have a minimal impact on server performance, checking for a new tree to grow only once every 200 ticks.

**Dependencies**

This mod requires the Fabric API. duhh

Enjoy the mod!
